options.label: OpenAI image
options.description: Generate the anchor image with the configured OpenAI-compatible image model.

options.label: DepthPro
options.description: Use the local DepthPro-based depth estimator.

options.label: SAM 3 text prompts
options.description: Use Meta SAM 3 with the requested-object hints as text prompts. Requires the dedicated `pat3d-sam3` env or PAT3D_SAM3_PYTHON, plus checkpoint access.

options.label: OpenAI LLM
options.description: Use the structured LLM adapter for descriptions, relations, and size priors.

options.label: Hunyuan3D
options.description: Generate textured object assets with the current Hunyuan-based path.

options.label: Legacy bridge
options.description: Use the legacy layout bridge with the refactored projection-aware refinement step.

options.label: fTetWild
options.description: Prepare low-poly and tet-ready meshes with the repo-local simplifier path.

options.label: Diff GIPC
options.description: Run the required Diff GIPC / IPC-backed physics stage with paper-aligned forward settings and optional diff-sim initialization.

options.label: Geometry viewer
options.description: Export the geometry-based preview and web scene bundle.
